title: Internal error occurs if unbound value assigned to parameter
body:
In regressions of cases from the SystemVerilog LRM, legal case on 1800-2012 page 564 (or 1800-2023 page 630) errors out:

%Error: Internal Error: ../V3EmitCFunc.h:1735: Unknown node type reached emitter: UNBOUNDED
    |   parameter int i = $;   
    |                  ^

**Code:**
```
parameter int i = $;
initial $display( $isunbounded(i) );
```

**Version:**
5.044

**Environment:**
Centos 7.9，GCC 11.5
